question.label: Thread follow
question.name: usually wait long — can you say more about what that means for you right now?
question.description: Runtime thread-follow injected because planner did not follow substantive answer.

answer: When feedback is specific and fast, I move much quicker.

assessment.note: He names a specific condition for moving faster—specific, fast feedback—showing clear clarity friction, with some engagement preserved because he responds quickly when support is timely.

history.answer_excerpt: I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.
When feedback is specific and fast, I move much quicker.
I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.
